title: Fights With Panache
summary: You’re a swashbuckling daredevil who fights with flamboyant style that’s entertaining to watch.
tiers: Tier 3: Acrobatic Attack or Flamboyant Boast
Tier 6: Agile Wit or Return to Sender
gm_intrusions: The display comes off looking silly, clumsy, or unattractive.
